xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:AddressOfRegisteredOfficeOfCom: Plot No. 409, H. No. 8-2-293, Maps Towers, 3rd Floor, Phase – III, Road No. 81, Jubilee Hills, Hyderabad (T.G.) – 500096.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:AddressOfCorporateOfficeOfComp: Plot No. 409, H. No. 8-2-293, Maps Towers, 3rd Floor, Phase – III, Road No. 81, Jubilee Hills, Hyderabad (T.G.) – 500096.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:NameOfTheHoldingOrSubsidiaryAs: Balaxi Healthcare Guatemala, S.A. Republic of Guatemala
Balaxi Healthcare Honduras, S.D.E. R.L.D.E. C.V.Honduras
Balaxi Healthcare el Salvador,S.A DE, El Salvador
Balaxi Healthcare Angola, Republic of Angola
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:MaterialIssueIdentified: Carbon Foot print in Global supply chain
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:RationaleForIdentifyingTheRisk: Climate change will result in strcter environmental regulations across sectors, this will increase transportation cost for the company
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:InCaseOfRiskApproachToAdaptOrM: Ensuring vendors/CDMOs are in compliance with the applicable environmental standards
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:RationaleForIdentifyingTheRisk: Fortser a diverse and inclusive workplaces that promotes equality, non-discromination and equal opportunities for all employees. This will lead to a good talent pool for the company
Ensuring a good governance and transparent practices can help securing stakeholder interest, a higher reputation, reduced risks and improved financial performance
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:SpecificCommitmentsGoalsAndTar: The company is determined to follow the path envisioned under the 9 principles laid down in the National voluntary Guidelines on Social,Environmental & Economic Responsibilities of Business issued by the Ministry of Corporate Affairs

xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:StatementByDirectorResponsible: The purpose of our business is to dedicatedly serve to ensure stakeholder delight and influence the environment and society at large with our good work, as we abide by our values that form the cornerstone of our business strategies,decisions and activities. We are committed to this roadmap as we seek to grow sustainably and deliver Pharmaceutical Products to frontier markets with excellence, again and again, with a lot more rigor and enthusiasm as the days pass.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfTheHighestAuthorityRe: Mr.Ashish Maheshwari (DIN:01575984), Managing Director Telephone:+9140 23555300 Email:secertarial@balaxi.in
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfSpecifiedCommitteeOfT: Yes, the committee consists of Managing Director as Chairman along with other functional heads.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:TopicsOrPrinciplesCoveredUnder: Anti Bribery and Anti Corruption Policy
Anti Bribery and Anti Corruption Policy
Anti Bribery and Anti Corruption Policy
Not Applicable, Company do not have any workers
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:NameOfTheRegulatoryOrEnforceme: National Stock exchange of India Limited (NSE)
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:BriefOfTheMonetaryCaseForPenal: During the year under review, the Company was non-compliant with Regulation 17(1)(a)of the SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015, due to a delay of 27 days in appointment of woman Independent Director.Consequently, the Company had paid a fine of Rs.1,35,000/-+ Applicable GST as levied by NSE
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:AntiCorruptionOrAntiBriberyPol: yes, the Company has an anti-cprruption and anti-bribery policy.company recognises and follows all applicable laws and regulations and respects laeful customers of the regions where we operate and transact. we are committed to acting and building relationships based on integrity and fairness in all our dealings. Hence, Balaxi has adopted a "Zero Tolerance" approach to bribery and corruption. The policy is available on the website of the company at https://balaxipharma.in/corporate-policies
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfImprovementsInEnviron: As on March 31,2025, the Company is operating on an asset-light model and hence, no capex has been incurred by the Company
As on March 31,2025, the Company is operating on an asset-light model and hence, no capex has been incurred by the Company
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DescribeTheProcessesInPlaceToS: we ensure that the products are disposed off/reused/recycled,as per the nature of the product at the end of the life cycle in respective markets.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:WebLinkOfEqualOppertunityPolic: yes, the policy is available on the website of the company at https://balaxipharma.in/corporate-policies
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfMechanismAvailableToR:
The Company has a grievance redressal policy, whcih addresse all kinds of issues an employee may face while at work. the grievance amy include:
1.Any kind of discrimination on account of disability, gender,race,sexual orientation, religion, marital status and social class.
2.Violation of human rights
3.Bullying/workplace harassment
4.Denial of applicable benefits
5.Working Conditions
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfOccupationalHealthAnd: yes, the company has implemented the health and safety policy which covers all the employees of the company
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DesclosureOfTheProcessesUsedTo:
appropriate policies/guidelines have bee formulated to address various types of hazards and related risk assessment & mitigation.
-all work-related hazards are identified basis the recommended guidelines
- their associated risk assessment procedures are part of the safety manual.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DescribeTheMeasuresTakenByTheE:
employee well being programs/initiatives are conducted for all the employees and during FY 2024-25 the following well-being initiatives were undertaken:
-women safety programs -Posh &amp, gender sensitization meetings -Road safety programs -Women self-defense program -Fire emergency training exit -General Health check up
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfAnyCorrectiveActionTa:
the company has implemented hygiene policy which ensures workplace cleanliness and basic amenities like availability of clean drinking water, proper sanitisation facilities,etc.
the HR team conducts review on a quarterly basis to ensure all the points under the hygiend policy are taken care of.Further, training of all employees regarding protocol to be followed in cae of any safety incident has been conducted
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DescribeTheProcessesForIdentif: Balaxi, a pharmaceutical distribution company, effectively identifies its stakeholders through meticulous research and analysis. Senior management and HODs of the respective departments interact with the respective stakeholders before forming an association. Primary stakeholders such as customers, suppliers, employees, and investors are recognized, understanding their needs and expectations accordingly. The WHO GMP certified units from which Balaxi procures products are also considered stakeholders, ensuring high-quality standards.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:PurposeAndScopeOfEngagementInc: Addressing requirements for products and grievances, if any
to sahre the specific requirements, status update on product deliveries and other terms of trade
for smooth functioning of business operations
To provide updates on company's operations and financial performance
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DescribeTheInternalMechanismsI: Company is committed to prociding a safe and positive work environment. In keeping with this philosophy,the organization has an open-door policy. Employees also have access to Humar Resource Department where they can highlight matters or concerns faced at the workplace. this is achieved through a well established and robust grievance resolution mechanism comprising of Internal Resolution Committee. Internal REsolution Committee adhere to the principles of natural justice, confidentiality,sensitivity,non-retaliation and fairness while addressing concerns. The concerns are handled with sensitivity,while delivering timely action and closure.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:MechanismsToPreventAdverseCons: Company is committed to prociding a safe and positive work environment. In keeping with this philosophy,the organization has an open-door policy. Employees also have access to Humar Resource Department where they can highlight matters or concerns faced at the workplace. this is achieved through a well established and robust grievance resolution mechanism comprising of Internal Resolution Committee. Internal REsolution Committee adhere to the principles of natural justice, confidentiality,sensitivity,non-retaliation and fairness while addressing concerns. The concerns are handled with sensitivity,while delivering timely action and closure
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfAnyCorrectiveActionsT: no significant risks reported in the assessment
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:AMechanismForZeroLiquidDischar: Zero liquid discharge is not applicable to the Company as it is an International Wholesale Distribution Company and dos nto own any manufacturing plants
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfWasteManagementPracti: As an international Wholesale Distribution Company,we do not manufacture any products adn thus do not use any hazardous or toxic chemicals
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:NameOfTheTradeAndIndustryChamb: Two Star Export House Certificate by Directorate General of Foreign trade
Pharmexcil Registration from Pharmaceuticals Export Promotion Council of India
FSSAI Certification from Food Safety and Standards Authority of India (FSSAI)
Certification from Agricultural and Processed Food Products Export Development Authority (APEDA)
Member of Federation of Indian Export Organisation (FIEO)
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DescribeTheMechanismsToReceive: we have a grievance redressal mechanism which covers all our stakeholders.Active engagement with the community and stakeholders requires an effective grievance redressal system that includes feedback loops and conflict resolution mechanisms. Stakeholders can share thei feedback/concern on info@balaxipharma.in
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DescribeTheMechanismsInPlaceTo: Consumers can directly contact the Company through email or phone and further our representative visits the clients regularly for their feedback and issues, if any.
